---
title: "ML models exercise"
---

First to install packages
```{r}
library(here)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidymodels)
```

Then to load data and set seed
```{r}
data_location <- here::here("ml-models-exercise", "clean.rds")
df <- readRDS(data_location)
set.seed(1234)
```

Change race 7 and 88 to category 3
```{r}

```
